phone.name: Phone
phone.text: You have a new voice message!

phone.name: Grandma
phone.text: Hey dear, make sure to clean up the arcade while we're gone!

door.name: Door
door.text: As much as you'd like to leave right now, you promised your grandma you'd take care of the arcade until she returns.

door.name: Door
door.text: You really regret it now huh?

file.name: File
file.text: A worker's file. Your name is on it.

cashregister.name: Cash Register
cashregister.text: Everything seems to be in order. But what do you know you don't work here.
